notes: What's new in 2.7.1: Stays logged in and keeps your API key across updates. GPT-5 fixed. Delete assets now. Locations no longer default to interiors (cemeteries/streets/parks render outdoors). Branding/title cards render as graphics, not random products. Every scene keeps its location, fuller descriptions, better continuity. Asset assistant stops repeating questions. (One-time: after installing, log in + enter your key once more, then it sticks.)
